title: Exium
description: This is a modpack which boosts the performance to insanely high levels for Apple Silicon based macOS devices.
body:
# We achieved 1500 FPS with Exium 3.0.0, and 1100 FPS while walking through the world (7 chunks render distance)
![New FPS record with Exium 3!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd8b232a2348141f3e98575cf9cbb0c0f24a5b1d.png)

![Exium 3.0 walking in world performance record.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/746d252eadec56244d6b8b90aae951bf08a441ae_0.webp)

# Note:
We're very happy to add support for Minecraft 1.21.11, the final 1.21.x version, with Exium 3.0 finally releasing, with new MAXIMUM performance, we achieved ~1500 FPS* looking to sky with nothing else rendering, and about 1000-1100 FPS in a normal playthrough walking through the world**

* The record (looking into sky) was achieved with 800x600@60Hz fullscreen resolution
** The record (walking in world) was achieved with 800x600@60Hz fullscreen resolution

Exium is a super high-end modpack for the popular game Minecraft, crafted specifically for macOS devices that are powered by the groundbreaking and revolutionary technology known as Apple Silicon. This particular modpack, Exium, is intentionally constructed with a focus on delivering truly the best performance by effectively leveraging the distinctive unique functionalities that the advanced Apple Silicon hardware is able to provide, complemented by the inherent efficiencies and streamlined features of the macOS ecosystem. The careful attention to detail in fine-tuning various settings for optimum performance, the careful and purposeful selection of only the most lightweight of modifications available, and an exceptionally strong emphasis on system compatibility ensure this well-thought-out modpack guarantees an experience that features butter-smooth gameplay, extremely high framerates, and is, quite literally, completely seamless for every single player who plays it and interacts within its environment.

Exium always attempts to avoid any performance-reducing bloat that's bound to get in the way of its ability to function well while emphasizing the greatest vanilla+ experience a person can ever have. In this highly tailored environment, the modifications are designed to suit people who are working on macOS systems. This modpack is radically planned with minute details and is clearly made to follow every given guideline laid down by Modrinth. While doing so, it highly values transparency, the creation of original content that is unique and innovative, as well as the correct incorporation and use of different third-party mods in an easy manner.

Whether you are an avid fan of Apple Silicon technology for the latest updates and breakthroughs, or simply want to get the best performance on your macOS device, Exium is definitely the place. You will find a well-thought-out modpack designed specifically for modern Minecraft versions, allowing you to enjoy a perfect gaming experience.
